Qisheng Li Publications CV Twitter GitHub

Hello, my name is Qisheng Li. I am currently an AI/ML resident in the Human-Centered Machine Intelligence team at Apple. I recently received my Ph.D. in Computer Science & Engineering from Paul G. Allen School at the University of Washington, advised by Katharina Reinecke. During my PhD, I’ve interned at Adobe Research (x2), Microsoft Research and Google Research.

My research interests span across human-computer interaction>, accessibility, and applied machine learning. My current research revolves around the design and development of ML-powered AR/VR applications for blind and low-vision users.

In my Ph.D. thesis, I employed mixed methods to demonstrate the feasibility of conducting large-scale online experiments with individuals with cognitive disabilities that are self-motivating, while maintaining rigorous experimental designs. Additionally, my experience in data science and machine learning has been honed through a variety of courseworks, projects and internships.

📢 I’m looking for industrial research positions this year (2023). Please feel free to contact me with any opportunities!

  • Contact: lqsh2013 [at] gmail.com

Before joining UW CSE, I received my triple bachelor’s degrees in Mathematics, Computer Science and Economics from Macalester College in St. Paul, Minnesota. For more details, please check out my CV.
